Strongest WTP evidence: IR Theory (r/worldnews 31M — everyone reads geopolitics news, nobody has the theoretical lens), Democratic Theory (Arrow's impossibility, Condorcet directly relevant to electoral reform debates), Revolution Theory (r/history 16M, deeply narrative-driven = high retention). Political science has the broadest reach of any academic discipline: every election triggers millions of people seeking frameworks. 'Why Nations Fail' sold 2M+ copies. 'The Prince' is a perennial bestseller. Political literacy is the difference between understanding power and being subject to it — and nobody is building the streak app that teaches it.
